info.name: Code Injector
info.summary: Inject custom HTML into every page head or body
info.description:
Allows administrators to inject arbitrary HTML code into the `<head>` or `<body>` of every Nextcloud page.
Common use cases include: - Analytics and tracking snippets (Google Analytics, Matomo, etc.) - Custom `<meta>` tags or Open Graph data - External stylesheet or script references - Tag manager containers (Google Tag Manager, etc.) - Custom branding elements
**Note:** Inline `<script>` content requires the Nextcloud Content Security Policy to allow `unsafe-inline` scripts, or the injected script must use a nonce. External scripts loaded via `src` attribute work without CSP changes.
info.author: Paweł Zawiślak
